t1# Copyright The Marin Authorst
2# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
3 
4import dataclasses
5from dataclasses import dataclass
6 
7import equinox as eqx
8import jax
9import jax.numpy as jnp
10from einops import rearrange
11from haliax.jax_utils import named_call
12from jax import random
13from jax.sharding import PartitionSpec as P
14from jax.sharding import reshard
15from jaxtyping import Array, Float, Int, PRNGKeyArray
16from levanter.grug.attention import AttentionMask, RotaryConfig, apply_rotary_embedding, attention
17from levanter.grug.loss import fused_linear_softmax_cross_entropy_loss
18from levanter.grug.sharding import Pbatch, Pembed_vocab, Plm_head, Plogits, unshard
19 
20 
21@dataclass(frozen=True)
22class GrugModelConfig:
23    """Hyperparameters for the Grug Llama-style transformer."""
24 
25    vocab_size: int
26    hidden_dim: int = 2048
27    intermediate_dim: int = 5632
28    num_layers: int = 24
29    num_heads: int = 16
30    num_kv_heads: int = 16
31    head_dim: int | None = None
32    max_seq_len: int = 4096
33    layer_norm_eps: float = 1e-5
34    initializer_std: float = 0.02
35    rope: RotaryConfig = dataclasses.field(default_factory=RotaryConfig)
36 
37    def __post_init__(self) -> None:
38        _ = self.inferred_head_dim
39        if self.num_heads % self.num_kv_heads != 0:
40            raise ValueError("num_heads must be divisible by num_kv_heads for grouped-query attention")
41        if self.vocab_size <= 0:
42            raise ValueError("vocab_size must be positive")
43        if self.max_seq_len <= 0:
44            raise ValueError("max_seq_len must be positive")
45 
46    @property
47    def inferred_head_dim(self) -> int:
48        if self.head_dim is not None:
49            return self.head_dim
50        if self.hidden_dim % self.num_heads != 0:
51            raise ValueError(
52                f"hidden_dim={self.hidden_dim} is not divisible by num_heads={self.num_heads}; set head_dim explicitly"
53            )
54        return self.hidden_dim // self.num_heads
55 
56 
57class CausalSelfAttention(eqx.Module):
58    w_q: jax.Array
59    w_k: jax.Array
60    w_v: jax.Array
61    w_o: jax.Array
62    cfg: GrugModelConfig = eqx.field(static=True)
63 
64    @staticmethod
65    def init(cfg: GrugModelConfig, *, key: PRNGKeyArray) -> "CausalSelfAttention":
66        k_q, k_k, k_v, k_o = random.split(key, 4)
67        d_model, n_heads, n_kv_heads, head_dim = cfg.hidden_dim, cfg.num_heads, cfg.num_kv_heads, cfg.inferred_head_dim
68        return CausalSelfAttention(
69            w_q=reshard(_init_weight(k_q, (d_model, n_heads * head_dim), cfg.initializer_std), P("data", "model")),
70            w_k=reshard(_init_weight(k_k, (d_model, n_kv_heads * head_dim), cfg.initializer_std), P("data", "model")),
71            w_v=reshard(_init_weight(k_v, (d_model, n_kv_heads * head_dim), cfg.initializer_std), P("data", "model")),
72            w_o=reshard(_init_weight(k_o, (n_heads * head_dim, d_model), cfg.initializer_std), P("model", "data")),
73            cfg=cfg,
74        )
75 
76    @named_call
77    def __call__(self, x: Float[Array, "B S D"], mask: AttentionMask | jax.Array) -> Float[Array, "B S D"]:
78        head_dim = self.cfg.inferred_head_dim
79        seq_len = x.shape[1]
80 
81        q = rearrange(jnp.einsum("bsh,hd->bsd", x, self.w_q), "... (n d) -> ... n d", d=head_dim)
82        k = rearrange(jnp.einsum("bsh,hd->bsd", x, self.w_k), "... (m d) -> ... m d", d=head_dim)
83        v = rearrange(jnp.einsum("bsh,hd->bsd", x, self.w_v), "... (m d) -> ... m d", d=head_dim)
84        q, k = apply_rotary_embedding(q, k, seq_len=seq_len, head_dim=head_dim, rope=self.cfg.rope)
85        attn_out = attention(q, k, v, mask)
86        attn_out = rearrange(attn_out, "... n d -> ... (n d)")
87        return jnp.einsum("bsh,hd->bsd", attn_out, self.w_o, out_sharding=Pbatch)
88 
89 
90class MLP(eqx.Module):
91    mlp_up: jax.Array
92    mlp_down: jax.Array
93 
94    @staticmethod
95    def init(cfg: GrugModelConfig, *, key: PRNGKeyArray) -> "MLP":
96        k_up, k_down = random.split(key, 2)
97        d_model, d_ff = cfg.hidden_dim, cfg.intermediate_dim
98        return MLP(
99            mlp_up=reshard(_init_weight(k_up, (d_model, d_ff), cfg.initializer_std), P("data", "model")),
100            mlp_down=reshard(_init_weight(k_down, (d_ff, d_model), cfg.initializer_std), P("model", "data")),
101        )
102 
103    @named_call
104    def __call__(self, x: Float[Array, "B S D"]) -> Float[Array, "B S D"]:
105        up = jnp.einsum("bsh,hm->bsm", x, self.mlp_up)
106        activated = jax.nn.relu(up)
107        return jnp.einsum("bsm,mh->bsh", activated, self.mlp_down, out_sharding=Pbatch)
108 
109 
110class RMSNorm(eqx.Module):
111    weight: jax.Array
112    eps: float = eqx.field(static=True)
113 
114    @staticmethod
115    def init(dim: int, eps: float) -> "RMSNorm":
116        return RMSNorm(weight=jnp.ones((dim,), dtype=jnp.float32), eps=eps)
117 
118    @named_call
119    def __call__(self, x: Float[Array, "... D"]) -> Float[Array, "... D"]:
120        weight = unshard(self.weight)
121        dtype = x.dtype
122        x = x.astype(jnp.float32)
123        variance = jnp.mean(jnp.square(x), axis=-1, keepdims=True)
124        normed = x * jax.lax.rsqrt(variance + self.eps)
125        return (normed * weight).astype(dtype)
126 
127 
128class Block(eqx.Module):
129    rms_attn: RMSNorm
130    attn: CausalSelfAttention
131    rms_mlp: RMSNorm
132    mlp: MLP
133 
134    @staticmethod
135    def init(cfg: GrugModelConfig, *, key: PRNGKeyArray) -> "Block":
136        attn_key, mlp_key = random.split(key, 2)
137        return Block(
138            rms_attn=RMSNorm.init(cfg.hidden_dim, cfg.layer_norm_eps),
139            attn=CausalSelfAttention.init(cfg, key=attn_key),
140            rms_mlp=RMSNorm.init(cfg.hidden_dim, cfg.layer_norm_eps),
141            mlp=MLP.init(cfg, key=mlp_key),
142        )
143 
144    @named_call
145    def __call__(self, x: Float[Array, "B S D"], mask: AttentionMask | jax.Array) -> Float[Array, "B S D"]:
146        x = x + self.attn(self.rms_attn(x), mask)
147        x = x + self.mlp(self.rms_mlp(x))
148        return x
149 
150 
151class Transformer(eqx.Module):
152    token_embed: jax.Array
153    output_proj: jax.Array
154    blocks: tuple[Block, ...]
155    final_norm: RMSNorm
156    config: GrugModelConfig = eqx.field(static=True)
157 
158    @staticmethod
159    def init(cfg: GrugModelConfig, *, key: PRNGKeyArray) -> "Transformer":
160        embed_key, out_key, *block_keys = random.split(key, cfg.num_layers + 2)
161        token_embed = reshard(
162            _init_weight(embed_key, (cfg.vocab_size, cfg.hidden_dim), cfg.initializer_std), Pembed_vocab
163        )
164        output_proj = reshard(_init_weight(out_key, (cfg.hidden_dim, cfg.vocab_size), cfg.initializer_std), Plm_head)
165        blocks = tuple(Block.init(cfg, key=layer_key) for layer_key in block_keys)
166        final_norm = RMSNorm.init(cfg.hidden_dim, cfg.layer_norm_eps)
167        return Transformer(
168            token_embed=token_embed,
169            output_proj=output_proj,
170            blocks=blocks,
171            final_norm=final_norm,
172            config=cfg,
173        )
174 
175    @named_call
176    def __call__(
177        self,
178        token_ids: Int[Array, "B S"],
179        mask: AttentionMask | jax.Array | None = None,
180    ) -> Float[Array, "B S D"]:
181        if mask is None:
182            mask = AttentionMask.causal()
183 
184        hidden = self.token_embed.at[token_ids].get(out_sharding=Pbatch)
185        for block in self.blocks:
186            hidden = eqx.filter_checkpoint(block)(hidden, mask)
187        return self.final_norm(hidden)
188 
189    @named_call
190    def logits(
191        self,
192        token_ids: Int[Array, "B S"],
193        mask: AttentionMask | jax.Array | None = None,
194    ) -> Float[Array, "B S V"]:
195        hidden = self(token_ids, mask=mask)
196        return jnp.einsum("bsh,hd->bsd", hidden, self.output_proj, out_sharding=Plogits)
197 
198    def next_token_loss(
199        self,
200        token_ids: Int[Array, "B S"],
201        loss_weight: Float[Array, "B S"],
202        *,
203        mask: AttentionMask | jax.Array | None = None,
204        reduction: str = "mean",
205        logsumexp_weight: float | None = None,
206        loss_dtype: jnp.dtype = jnp.float32,
207    ) -> jax.Array:
208        """Compute next-token cross-entropy loss for a batch."""
209        hidden = self(token_ids, mask=mask)
210        labels = jnp.concatenate([token_ids[:, 1:], token_ids[:, :1] * 0], axis=1).astype(jnp.int32)
211        loss_weight = loss_weight.astype(loss_dtype)
212 
213        return fused_linear_softmax_cross_entropy_loss(
214            hidden,
215            self.output_proj,
216            labels,
217            weight=loss_weight,
218            reduction=reduction,
219            logsumexp_weight=logsumexp_weight,
220            dtype=loss_dtype,
221        )
222 
223 
224def _init_weight(key: PRNGKeyArray, shape: tuple[int, ...], std: float) -> Float[Array, "..."]:
225    return std * random.truncated_normal(key, -3, 3, shape)
226 
227 
228def debug_mesh_and_token_pspec(num_devices: int, model_axis_size: int = 1) -> tuple[jax.sharding.AbstractMesh, P]:
229    """Return a small abstract mesh and token sharding for lowering contract tests."""
230    if num_devices <= 0:
231        raise ValueError(f"num_devices must be positive, got {num_devices}")
232    if model_axis_size <= 0:
233        raise ValueError(f"model_axis_size must be positive, got {model_axis_size}")
234    if num_devices % model_axis_size != 0:
235        raise ValueError(f"num_devices ({num_devices}) must be divisible by model_axis_size ({model_axis_size})")
236    data_axis_size = num_devices // model_axis_size
237    mesh = jax.sharding.AbstractMesh(
238        axis_sizes=(1, data_axis_size, model_axis_size),
239        axis_names=("replica_dcn", "data", "model"),
240        axis_types=(
241            jax.sharding.AxisType.Explicit,
242            jax.sharding.AxisType.Explicit,
243            jax.sharding.AxisType.Explicit,
244        ),
245    )
246    return mesh, P(("replica_dcn", "data"), None)
247 
248 
249__all__ = [
250    "MLP",
251    "Block",
252    "CausalSelfAttention",
253    "GrugModelConfig",
254    "RMSNorm",
255    "Transformer",
256    "debug_mesh_and_token_pspec",
257]

12import jax
13import jax.numpy as jnp
14import jmp
15import levanter.callbacks as callbacks
16import levanter.tracker
17import optax
18from fray.cluster import ResourceConfig
19from haliax import Axis
20from haliax.partitioning import set_mesh
21from jax.sharding import Mesh, NamedSharding
22from jax.sharding import PartitionSpec as P
23from jax.tree_util import register_dataclass
24from jaxtyping import PRNGKeyArray
25from levanter.callbacks.state_adapter import StateCallbackRunner
26from levanter.callbacks.watch import WatchConfig, compute_watch_stats
27from levanter.data import AsyncDataset, DataLoader

31from levanter.eval import TaggedEvaluator, cb_tagged_evaluate
32from levanter.grug.sharding import compact_grug_mesh
33from levanter.models.lm_model import LmExample
34from levanter.optim import AdamConfig, OptimizerConfig
35from levanter.schedule import BatchSchedule
36from levanter.trainer import TrainerConfig

45logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
46 
47 
48@dataclass(frozen=True)
49class GrugTrainerConfig:
50    """Runtime knobs for grug training."""
51 
52    trainer: TrainerConfig = field(default_factory=lambda: TrainerConfig(use_explicit_mesh_axes=True))
53    train_batch_pspec: P = field(default_factory=lambda: P(("replica_dcn", "data")))
54    data_seed: int | None = None
55    log_every: int = 1
56    ema_beta: float | None = None  # EMA coefficient for eval/checkpoint model; None disables EMA.
57    z_loss_weight: float = 0.0  # Weight on logsumexp (z-loss) stabilization term.
58 
59 
60@dataclass(frozen=True)
61class GrugEvalConfig:
62    """Perplexity eval settings for grug training."""
63 
64    eval_batch_size: int = 512
65    eval_batch_pspec: P = field(default_factory=lambda: P(("replica_dcn", "data")))
66    steps_per_eval: int | None = 1000
67    max_eval_batches: int | None = None
68    prefix: str = "eval"
69    eval_current: bool = True
70    eval_ema: bool = True
71    compute_bpb: bool = True
72 
73 
74@dataclass(frozen=True)
75class GrugRunConfig:
76    """Top-level config for grug training."""
77 
78    model: GrugModelConfig
79    data: LmDataConfig
80    resources: ResourceConfig
81    optimizer: OptimizerConfig = field(default_factory=AdamConfig)
82    trainer: GrugTrainerConfig = field(default_factory=GrugTrainerConfig)
83    eval: GrugEvalConfig | None = field(default_factory=GrugEvalConfig)
84 
85 
86def build_train_dataset(
87    data_config: LmDataConfig,
88    *,
89    max_seq_len: int,
90    batch_schedule: BatchSchedule,
91    key: PRNGKeyArray,
92) -> MixtureDataset[GrugLmExample]:
93    pos = Axis("position", max_seq_len)
94    mix_key, shuffle_key = jax.random.split(key)
95    weights = data_config.train_weights
96    if isinstance(weights, list):
97        weights = rescale_mixture_schedule_for_batch_schedule(weights, batch_schedule)
98 
99    initial_batch_size = batch_schedule.batch_size_at_step(0)
100    datasets = data_config.train_sets(pos, key=shuffle_key, initial_batch_size=initial_batch_size)
101    return MixtureDataset(
102        datasets=datasets,
103        weights=weights,
104        stop_strategy=data_config.stop_strategy,
105        key=mix_key,
106        block_size=data_config.mixture_block_size,
107    )
108 
109 
110def build_train_loader(
111    dataset: AsyncDataset[GrugLmExample],
112    *,
113    batch_schedule: BatchSchedule,
114    mesh: Mesh,
115    batch_pspec: P = P(("replica_dcn", "data")),
116) -> DataLoader[GrugLmExample]:
117    # DataLoader uses this batch axis mapping to shard batches across the distributed mesh.
118    axis_resource = batch_pspec[0]
119    return DataLoader(
120        dataset,
121        batch_schedule.schedule,
122        mesh=mesh,
123        axis_resources={"__BATCH__": axis_resource},
124        batch_axis_name="__BATCH__",
125        allow_nondivisible_batch_size=False,
126    )
127 
128 
129def build_tagged_evaluator(
130    *,
131    data_config: LmDataConfig,
132    max_seq_len: int,
133    mesh: Mesh,
134    eval_cfg: GrugEvalConfig,
135) -> TaggedEvaluator[LmExample | GrugLmExample, Transformer] | None:
136    pos = Axis("position", max_seq_len)
137    tagged_eval_sets = data_config.tagged_eval_sets(pos)
138    if len(tagged_eval_sets) == 0:
139        logger.warning("No evaluation datasets provided.")
140        return None
141 
142    max_examples_per_dataset = None
143    if eval_cfg.max_eval_batches is not None:
144        max_examples_per_dataset = eval_cfg.max_eval_batches * eval_cfg.eval_batch_size
145 
146    tokenizer = data_config.the_tokenizer if eval_cfg.compute_bpb else None
147    batch_axis_resource = eval_cfg.eval_batch_pspec[0]
148    eval_axis_mapping = {"batch": batch_axis_resource}
149    eval_batch = Axis("batch", eval_cfg.eval_batch_size)
150    eval_array_sharding = NamedSharding(mesh, P(batch_axis_resource, None))
151 
152    def eval_loss_fn(model: Transformer, batch: LmExample | GrugLmExample) -> tuple[jax.Array, jax.Array, jax.Array]:
153        if isinstance(batch, LmExample):
154            batch = grug_lm_example_from_named(batch)
155        per_pos_loss = model.next_token_loss(
156            batch.tokens,
157            batch.loss_weight,
158            mask=batch.attn_mask,
159            reduction="none",
160            logsumexp_weight=None,
161        )
162        per_pos_loss = jax.sharding.reshard(per_pos_loss, eval_array_sharding)
163        per_pos_weight = jax.sharding.reshard(batch.loss_weight, eval_array_sharding)
164        per_pos_token_id = jnp.roll(batch.tokens, -1, axis=-1)
165        return per_pos_loss, per_pos_weight, per_pos_token_id
166 
167    return TaggedEvaluator(
168        EvalBatch=eval_batch,
169        tagged_eval_sets=tagged_eval_sets,
170        loss_fn=eval_loss_fn,
171        tokenizer=tokenizer,
172        device_mesh=mesh,
173        axis_mapping=eval_axis_mapping,
174        max_examples_per_dataset=max_examples_per_dataset,
175    )
176 
177 
178def _compute_flops(
179    *,
180    model_config: GrugModelConfig,
181) -> tuple[float, dict[str, float]]:
182    flops_per_token = lm_flops_per_token(
183        hidden_dim=model_config.hidden_dim,
184        intermediate_dim=model_config.intermediate_dim,
185        num_layers=model_config.num_layers,
186        num_kv_heads=model_config.num_kv_heads,
187        num_heads=model_config.num_heads,
188        seq_len=model_config.max_seq_len,
189        vocab_size=model_config.vocab_size,
190        glu=False,
191    )
192    flops_per_example = 3 * flops_per_token * model_config.max_seq_len
193 
194    flops_summary: dict[str, float] = {
195        "throughput/flops_per_token_analytic": flops_per_token,
196        "throughput/flops_per_example_analytic": flops_per_example,
197    }
198 
199    return flops_per_example, flops_summary
200 
201 
202def _make_mixture_stage_callback(train_dataset: MixtureDataset, batch_schedule: BatchSchedule):
203    last_mixture_stage = -1
204 
205    def log_mixture_stage(step_info):
206        nonlocal last_mixture_stage
207        seq_index = batch_schedule.global_data_offset_by_step(step_info.step)
208        block_id = seq_index // train_dataset.block_size
209        stage = train_dataset._get_stage_for_block(block_id)
210        if stage == last_mixture_stage:
211            return
212 
213        weights = train_dataset.weight_stages[stage][1]
214        mixture_log = {f"mixture/weight/{name}": weight for name, weight in weights.items()}
215        mixture_log["mixture/stage"] = stage
216        levanter.tracker.log(mixture_log, step=step_info.step)
217        last_mixture_stage = stage
218 
219    return log_mixture_stage
220 
221 
222@register_dataclass
223@dataclass(frozen=True)
224class GrugTrainState:
225    step: jax.Array
226    params: Transformer
227    opt_state: optax.OptState
228    ema_params: Transformer | None
229 
230 
231def initial_state(
232    model_config: GrugModelConfig,
233    *,
234    optimizer: optax.GradientTransformation,
235    mp: jmp.Policy,
236    key: PRNGKeyArray,
237    ema_beta: float | None,
238) -> GrugTrainState:
239    params = mp.cast_to_param(Transformer.init(model_config, key=key))
240    return GrugTrainState(
241        step=jnp.array(0, dtype=jnp.int32),
242        params=params,
243        opt_state=optimizer.init(params),
244        ema_params=params if ema_beta is not None else None,
245    )
246 
247 
248def _make_train_step(
249    optimizer: optax.GradientTransformation,
250    mp: jmp.Policy,
251    *,
252    z_loss_weight: float,
253    ema_beta: float | None,
254    watch_config: WatchConfig | None = None,
255):
256    one = jnp.array(1, dtype=jnp.int32)
257    z_loss = z_loss_weight if z_loss_weight > 0 else None
258    if watch_config is not None:
259        if isinstance(watch_config.watch_targets, str):
260            watch_targets = tuple(t.strip() for t in watch_config.watch_targets.split(","))
261        else:
262            watch_targets = tuple(watch_config.watch_targets)
263    else:
264        watch_targets = ()
265 
266    @functools.partial(jax.jit, donate_argnums=(0,), static_argnames=("compute_watch",))
267    def train_step(state: GrugTrainState, batch, *, compute_watch: bool = False):
268        def loss_fn(params):
269            compute_params = mp.cast_to_compute(params)
270            return compute_params.next_token_loss(
271                batch.tokens,
272                batch.loss_weight,
273                mask=batch.attn_mask,
274                reduction="mean",
275                logsumexp_weight=z_loss,
276            )
277 
278        loss, grads = jax.value_and_grad(loss_fn)(state.params)
279        updates, opt_state = optimizer.update(grads, state.opt_state, state.params)
280        params = optax.apply_updates(state.params, updates)
281 
282        if ema_beta is None:
283            ema_params = None
284        else:
285            if state.ema_params is None:
286                raise ValueError("ema_params must be initialized when ema_beta is set.")
287            ema_params = jax.tree_util.tree_map(
288                lambda old, new: ema_beta * old + (1.0 - ema_beta) * new,
289                state.ema_params,
290                params,
291            )
292 
293        watch_stats = None
294        if watch_config is not None and compute_watch:
295            watch_stats = compute_watch_stats(
296                watch_targets=watch_targets,
297                include_norms=watch_config.include_norms,
298                include_per_parameter_norms=watch_config.include_per_parameter_norms,
299                include_histogram=watch_config.include_histograms,
300                split_scan_layers=watch_config.split_scan_layers,
301                params=state.params,
302                grads=grads,
303                updates=updates,
304                opt_state=state.opt_state,
305                model_tree_type=type(state.params),
306            )
307 
308        next_state = dataclasses.replace(
309            state,
310            step=state.step + one,
311            params=params,
312            opt_state=opt_state,
313            ema_params=ema_params,
314        )
315 
316        return next_state, {"train/loss": loss}, watch_stats
317 
318    return train_step
319 
320 
321def _run_grug_local(config: GrugRunConfig) -> None:
322    """Run grug training locally inside a Fray worker."""
323    trainer = config.trainer.trainer
324    trainer.initialize()
325    levanter.tracker.log_configuration(config)
326 
327    run_id = trainer.id
328    if run_id is None:
329        raise ValueError("trainer.id was not initialized")
330 
331    optimizer = config.optimizer.build(trainer.num_train_steps)
332    watch_config = trainer.watch
333    train_step = _make_train_step(
334        optimizer,
335        trainer.mp,
336        z_loss_weight=config.trainer.z_loss_weight,
337        ema_beta=config.trainer.ema_beta,
338        watch_config=watch_config if watch_config.is_enabled else None,
339    )
340 
341    data_key, model_key = jax.random.split(jax.random.PRNGKey(trainer.seed), 2)
342    if config.trainer.data_seed is not None:
343        data_key = jax.random.PRNGKey(config.trainer.data_seed)
344 
345    # Grug uses raw PartitionSpecs rather than Trainer's logical axis mapping.
346    # Keep the mesh compact so P(("replica_dcn", "data")) spans slices directly.
347    mesh = compact_grug_mesh()
348    with set_mesh(mesh):
349        batch_schedule = trainer.batch_schedule
350 
351        train_dataset = build_train_dataset(
352            config.data,
353            max_seq_len=config.model.max_seq_len,
354            batch_schedule=batch_schedule,
355            key=data_key,
356        )
357        train_loader = build_train_loader(
358            train_dataset,
359            batch_schedule=batch_schedule,
360            mesh=mesh,
361            batch_pspec=config.trainer.train_batch_pspec,
362        )
363 
364        @jax.jit
365        def _init_state(model_rng):
366            return initial_state(
367                config.model,
368                optimizer=optimizer,
369                mp=trainer.mp,
370                key=model_rng,
371                ema_beta=config.trainer.ema_beta,
372            )
373 
374        state = _init_state(model_key)
375 
376        checkpointer = trainer.checkpointer.create(run_id)
377        state = restore_grug_state_from_checkpoint(
378            state,
379            checkpoint_search_paths=trainer.checkpoint_search_paths(run_id),
380            load_checkpoint_setting=trainer.load_checkpoint,
381            mesh=mesh,
382            allow_partial=trainer.allow_partial_checkpoint,
383        )
384 
385        levanter.tracker.log_summary({"parameter_count": parameter_count(state.params)})
386 
387        flops_per_example, flops_summary = _compute_flops(model_config=config.model)
388        levanter.tracker.log_summary(flops_summary)
389 
390        eval_cfg = config.eval
391        evaluator = None
392        if eval_cfg is not None:
393            evaluator = build_tagged_evaluator(
394                data_config=config.data,
395                max_seq_len=config.model.max_seq_len,
396                mesh=mesh,
397                eval_cfg=eval_cfg,
398            )
399 
400        profiler_cfg = trainer.profiler
401        profiler_num_steps = profiler_cfg.resolve_num_profile_steps(num_train_steps=trainer.num_train_steps)
402        profiler_enabled = profiler_cfg.is_enabled and profiler_num_steps > 0
403 
404        log_every = max(1, config.trainer.log_every)
405        iterator = LoadingTimeTrackerIterator(train_loader.iter_from_step(int(state.step)))
406 
407        state_callbacks = StateCallbackRunner[GrugTrainState](
408            step_getter=lambda s: s.step,
409            model_getter=lambda s: s.params,
410            eval_model_getter=lambda s: s.ema_params if s.ema_params is not None else s.params,
411            opt_state_getter=lambda s: s.opt_state,
412        )
413        state_callbacks.add_hook(
414            callbacks.log_performance_stats(config.model.max_seq_len, batch_schedule, flops_per_example),
415            every=log_every,
416        )
417        state_callbacks.add_hook(callbacks.pbar_logger(total=trainer.num_train_steps), every=log_every)
418        state_callbacks.add_hook(callbacks.log_step_info(trainer.num_train_steps), every=log_every)
419        if profiler_enabled:
420            state_callbacks.add_hook(
421                callbacks.profile(
422                    str(trainer.log_dir / run_id / "profiler"),
423                    profiler_cfg.start_step,
424                    profiler_num_steps,
425                    profiler_cfg.perfetto_link,
426                ),
427                every=1,
428            )
429        state_callbacks.add_hook(_make_mixture_stage_callback(train_dataset, batch_schedule), every=1)
430        if evaluator is not None and eval_cfg is not None:
431            interval = eval_cfg.steps_per_eval
432            eval_ema = eval_cfg.eval_ema and config.trainer.ema_beta is not None
433            if interval is not None and interval > 0 and (eval_cfg.eval_current or eval_ema):
434                state_callbacks.add_hook(
435                    cb_tagged_evaluate(
436                        evaluator,
437                        prefix=eval_cfg.prefix,
438                        eval_current=eval_cfg.eval_current,
439                        eval_ema=eval_ema,
440                    ),
441                    every=interval,
442                )
443 
444        last_loss: float | jax.Array = 0.0
445        last_step_duration = 0.0
446 
447        # Main optimization loop.
448        try:
449            while int(state.step) < trainer.num_train_steps:
450                with jax.profiler.TraceAnnotation("load_batch"):
451                    batch = next(iterator)
452                step_start = time.perf_counter()
453                current_step = int(state.step)
454                # grad_watch runs only on its configured interval.
455                compute_watch = (
456                    watch_config.is_enabled and watch_config.interval > 0 and current_step % watch_config.interval == 0
457                )
458                state, metrics, watch_stats = train_step(state, batch, compute_watch=compute_watch)
459                step = int(state.step) - 1
460 
461                jax.block_until_ready(metrics["train/loss"])
462                duration = time.perf_counter() - step_start
463                hook_start = time.perf_counter()
464                with jax.profiler.TraceAnnotation("callbacks"):
465                    state_callbacks.run(state, loss=metrics["train/loss"], step_duration=duration)
466                    last_loss = metrics["train/loss"]
467                    last_step_duration = duration
468                    levanter.tracker.log({"throughput/hook_time": time.perf_counter() - hook_start}, step=step)
469                    levanter.tracker.log({"throughput/loading_time": iterator.this_load_time}, step=step)
470 
471                    if watch_stats is not None:
472                        levanter.tracker.log(watch_stats, step=step)
473 
474                if checkpointer is not None:
475                    checkpointer.on_step(tree=state, step=int(state.step))
476        except BaseException:
477            logger.exception(
478                "Fatal error in grug training loop; skipping final callbacks/checkpoint to preserve root cause"
479            )
480            raise
481        else:
482            # Mirror classic trainer behavior: force callbacks on the last completed step.
483            state_callbacks.run(state, loss=last_loss, step_duration=last_step_duration, force=True)
484            if checkpointer is not None:
485                checkpointer.on_step(tree=state, step=int(state.step), force=True)
486                checkpointer.wait_until_finished()
487 
488    levanter.tracker.current_tracker().finish()
489 
490 
491def run_grug(config: GrugRunConfig) -> None:
492    """Dispatch grug training through Fray jobs."""
493    trainer = config.trainer.trainer
494    if trainer.id is None:
495        raise ValueError("trainer.id must be set before dispatching grug training.")
496 
497    dispatch_grug_training_run(
498        run_id=trainer.id,
499        config=config,
500        local_entrypoint=_run_grug_local,
501        resources=config.resources,
502    )
503 
504 
505__all__ = [
506    "GrugEvalConfig",
507    "GrugRunConfig",
508    "GrugTrainState",
509    "GrugTrainerConfig",
510    "initial_state",
511    "run_grug",
512]

Back to top
